labels.hideWordShortDesc: Challenge a friend to find your hidden word.
labels.hideWordLongDesc: Type a secret word and share the board with a friend. Your word is hidden somewhere among the letters — they have to find it by swiping. They won't see the word until they discover it themselves.
labels.hideWordHint: Type one word with 4 to 10 letters.
labels.hideWordErrorLength: Word length must be between 4 and 10.
labels.hideWordErrorChars: Use only letters valid in the selected language.
labels.standardModeShortDesc: Find all hidden words on the board.
labels.standardModeLongDesc: Swipe across adjacent letters to form words. The board is generated with a guaranteed set of findable words — from short 3-letter picks to longer high-scoring ones. Find them all to win.
labels.standardRuleMinFindable: At least {count} words can be found
labels.winText: You found all words on this board.
labels.urlErrorText: The shared link is invalid or expired. Starting a new game.
